envelope.subject: JMFL Morning Brief 22 Apr 2026
envelope.bodyText:
JMFL Morning Brief — 22 Apr 2026.

MARUTI: Sell. TP ₹11,000 from ₹11,500. PV competition intensifies; H1 share loss expected. We downgrade to Sell.

LT: Buy. TP ₹4,500. Order book strong at ₹5.2tn; capex discipline intact.

TCS: Buy. TP ₹4,200 from ₹4,050. Margins expand on BFSI demand.
